# Spaces and acceleration workflows

## Role of Spaces

Use Spaces when shared, curated context accelerates repeated work.

## Good uses

- codebase onboarding
- feature initiative context
- investigation threads
- coordination around a subsystem or project

## Design questions

- which materials should be in the Space?
- who needs access?
- is the Space for discovery, execution, or both?
- how often will it be refreshed?

## Use with other mechanisms

Spaces pair well with:
- codebase exploration playbooks
- planning
- coding agent pilots
- review and modernization efforts
